# Harden §0 invariant against mechanical and semantic loopholes

## Overview
Harden the §0 swarm invariant regarding merge execution, following the Verify-Before-Assert discipline arc (Phase C).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] `AGENTS.md` is updated to explicitly prohibit agent-executed merges via an intent-based invariant: "No `gh pr merge` (Human-Only execution)."
- [x] The **Cross-Family Cascade Clause** is explicitly codified to prevent aggregate-approval-as-authorization loopholes.
- [x] `AGENTS_STARTUP.md` is updated to cleanly mirror the `AGENTS.md` §0 invariant for cold-cache resilience.
- [x] Documentation reflects the latest MCP tool changes, including `sync_all` usage for ticket edits.

Clause as an explicit architectural boundary."
